conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The tone of the email must remain formal throughout.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The tone of the email must remain formal throughout. The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Status of Laptop Repair – [Your Name/Reference Number]

Dear Repair Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to formally inquire about the current status of the repair work being performed on my laptop, which was submitted to your facility on [Date of Submission]. The device was received under reference number [Reference Number, if applicable].

While I understand that technical repairs can sometimes take longer than anticipated, I am eager to know if there are any updates regarding the completion of the service or if any additional information is required from my end to facilitate the process.

Could you please provide an estimated timeline for when the device might be ready for pickup or shipping?

Thank you for your time and assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Your Email Address]
